headline: Woman Returns Online Order Because 'The Box Was Judging Me,' Support Agent Had No Response
summary: The box was plain brown cardboard. She claims it 'looked disappointed in her life choices.'
fullBody: Amanda BoxJudge returned a perfectly fine sweater because the shipping box 'gave her bad energy.' 'It was looking at me sideways,' Amanda said. The customer service agent asked 'ma'am, it's a box.' Amanda insisted. 'It knows what I did.' The return was processed. The box has been recycled. Amanda is now 'healing from cardboard trauma.' She's asked for future deliveries to be sent in 'non-judgmental packaging.'
